title: The Sealed Letter
subtitle: Chapter 02 · The Wider Fractures
introduction: A quiet study desk has letters, candle wax, and a wax seal stamp. Focus on the red wax seal.
description: A sealed letter sits on the table. A copper envelope opener slides near the paper, but the message text appears on the folded sheet exactly two seconds before the wax seal is broken.
observation: The internal text of the letter aligns and reads clearly while the outer red wax seal is completely unbroken.
reconstruction: Carry the red wax seal, the copper opener, and the folded sheet.
attunements: The red wax is completely solid and unbroken, carrying no cracks.
The copper blade is cold, held exactly one inch away from the paper.
The ink on the inside is dry, but readable through the sealed paper.
revelation:
What was wrong: the message was read and registered before the envelope could be opened.

Why it mattered: the sender's intentions were already fully known to the receiver, bypassing the physical envelope entirely.

anomaly_definition.misstep_text: Not there. Watch the red wax seal on the folded letter.
anomaly_definition.success_text: Cognitive pre-revelation detected. The text is readable while the seal is intact.

capture_window.guidance_text: HOLD WHEN THE WAX MOLECULES ENCOUNTER FRICTION.
capture_window.success_text: Timeline isolated: text is readable while sealed.

evidence_nodes.relevance: THE RED WAX IS SOLID AND UNBROKEN. Red candle wax holds the folds securely in place, showing no tool fractures.
THE COPPER BLADE IS COLD. The opener hangs in suspension, held one inch away from the paper folds.
THE INTERNAL INK IS LEGIBLE. The text is read and processed before the seal is physically destroyed.
